build_system: Flutter pub for frontend, pip for backend. No Makefile. No Dockerfile.
test_framework: flutter_test with mocktail for frontend, pytest with pytest-asyncio for backend
build_command: cd frontend && flutter pub get && flutter analyze (frontend); pip install -r requirements.txt (backend)
test_command: cd frontend && flutter test (frontend); cd backend && pytest (backend)
verification_instructions: 1. Run flutter pub get in frontend/ to confirm deps resolve. 2. Run flutter test in frontend/ to confirm tests pass. 3. On backend branch, run pip install -r requirements.txt && pytest to confirm backend tests pass.
snapshot_or_generated_files: frontend/lib/data/models/*.g.dart are generated by json_serializable via build_runner. Do not modify these.
setup_instructions: Frontend: cd frontend && flutter pub get. Backend: pip install -r requirements.txt
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Git remote fetch is failing through gateway but local branch ops work. Cannot fetch remote branches - must create feature/backend-setup from current branch.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main. All work on feature branches. Tests in /tests folder. Unit tests for all business logic. Integration tests for all API endpoints. Widget tests for critical Flutter screens.
key_patterns: Frontend: Clean architecture (core/data/presentation). Models use either json_annotation+generated code or manual fromJson/toJson. Widgets use Google Fonts, AppColors, AppSizes constants. Backend: FastAPI with Pydantic models, auth middleware (Bearer token), rate limiting middleware (in-memory sliding window). All endpoints have auth dependency.
directory_structure: Root: app/ (backend FastAPI), frontend/ (Flutter), supabase/. Frontend: lib/core/constants|theme|utils, lib/data/models|providers|repositories|services, lib/presentation/screens|widgets. Backend on this branch: app/config.py, app/main.py, app/middleware/{auth,rate_limit}.py, app/routers/{projects,voice}.py. Backend branch will need backend/ directory with similar structure.
